Name: Auto White Balance
Code:
# Auto White Balance — ColorYUV autowhite + optional autogain
mx = _MatrixAuto(c)
yuv = EnsureColorspaceSafe(c, "YV24", matrix=mx)
corrected = ColorYUV(yuv, autowhite=true, autogain={autogain})
# Blend original/corrected by strength (Expr on all 3 planes)
c = Expr(yuv, corrected, "x 1.0 {strength} - * y {strength} * +", "x 1.0 {strength} - * y {strength} * +", "x 1.0 {strength} - * y {strength} * +")
